children.heading: Limitation on acquisition of lands and interests in lands
children.label: a Limitation on acquisition of lands and interests in lands
children.text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this subchapter, but not more than $70,100,000 for the acquisition of lands and interests in lands.

children.heading: Development of plan; consultation with State; transmittal to Congressional committees; contents
children.label: b Development of plan; consultation with State; transmittal to Congressional committees; contents

children.text: the facilities needed to accommodate the health, safety, and recreation needs of the visiting public;
the location and estimated cost of all facilities; and
the projected need for any additional facilities within the area.

children.heading: Restoration of vegetative cover to eliminate erosion
children.label: c Restoration of vegetative cover to eliminate erosion
children.text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated not more than $500,000 for fiscal year 1986, $1,000,000 for fiscal year 1987, $1,500,000 for fiscal year 1988, and $1,750,000 for fiscal year 1989, to carry out the provisions of . Any amounts authorized to be appropriated for any fiscal year under this subsection which are not appropriated for that fiscal year shall remain available for appropriation in succeeding fiscal years.section 460ff–3(c)(2) of this title
